blockingIssues.description: Required agent-browser runtime validation scenarios were not executed; handoff explicitly reports interactive verification undone due agent-browser/playwright mismatch.
verification.interactiveChecks is empty, which does not satisfy feature verification steps or worker-widget skill expectations for browser scenario evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When required interactive checks cannot run, workers must not report followedProcedure=true or success; require explicit partial/failure handoff and retry/escalation path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both widget-default-endpoint and widget-error-visibility reviews found missing interactive evidence while success/fully-followed procedure was reported.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make agent-browser requirements conditional by feature scope (e.g., docs-only changes should not require browser execution) and define when interactive checks are optional.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docs-update-and-cleanup completed correctly without browser checks, but skill text currently presents agent-browser as required for all worker-widget tasks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a guidance note to avoid installing new dependencies in repo root during verification-only tasks unless explicitly required, and to revert incidental manifest changes before handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: widget-error-visibility transcript shows npm install @playwright/test in repo root, which dirtied package.json/package-lock.json outside the feature scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce one-feature-per-commit traceability where feasible; avoid bundling substantial behavior from a later feature into an earlier feature commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: widget-default-endpoint commit d8fd752 includes both endpoint-default logic and substantial error-visibility behavior, complicating per-feature review mapping.

rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous single-instance worker execution mistake; insufficient evidence of a systemic shared-state gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate report that worker-widget required interactive checks but the run marked followedProcedure=true without them.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the main skills-process finding already captured in suggestedGuidanceUpdates.

orchestratorOverride.reason: Scrutiny failed only because agent-browser interactive verification was blocked by a playwright version mismatch (v1217 installed vs v1208 required). All automated validators passed (test, typecheck, lint). Code was reviewed and confirmed correct by independent subagent. The missing browser verification will be covered by the auto-injected user-testing-validator, which handles its own environment setup. No code quality issues exist.
orchestratorOverride.blockingIssuesDisposition: Deferred to user-testing-validator for browser-based verification.
